name: Studio: hs_alerts anomaly validate → Confluence
description: Load hs_alerts surveillance rows, keep front_running_positive scenarios, validate alert_id/trader_id with evaluator, summarize in Starlark, publish to Confluence only when anomalies exist, export validated CSV. Demo fixture scenarios: front_running_positive / front_running_negative.

config.query: SELECT alert_id, trader_id, trader_name, scenario, keyword, alert_date, description FROM hs_alerts LIMIT 100

config.code_summary: Counts validated anomaly rows and builds a single Confluence-ready summary row with title, markdown body, and anomalies_found_count for branching. Only passed evaluator rows arrive here.

config.content: No validated trade anomalies detected. Confluence report not published.
